summary: This cluster focuses on the taxonomy and systematics of the freshwater algal class Conjugatophyceae (Zygnematophyceae), with a particular emphasis on the genera *Mougeotia*, *Mougeotiopsis*, and *Transeauina*. The research synthesizes historical nomenclature and classification changes, documenting the redefinition of the class and the evolutionary relationships among its orders. Key findings include a revised count of described species within the newly defined class, based on data from AlgaeBase, and a clarification of the taxonomic history that led to the current classification. The geographic and ecological scope is limited to freshwater habitats, reflecting the exclusive distribution of this algal group.
